title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: The organisers postponed the match due to rain.
example.secondSentence: The match was (1) _________ due to rain.

questions.firstSentence: This is the first time I have visited Tokyo.
Mark's car is not as expensive as Pete's.
She was in the habit of drinking two coffees a day.
Without her help, I wouldn't have passed the exam.
questions.secondSentence: If she hadn't helped me, I (1) _________ the exam.

questions.firstSentence: They are currently building a new hospital.
questions.secondSentence: A new hospital is (1) _________ at the moment.

questions.firstSentence: The manager said to him, 'Don't be late again.'
